name: CrossSectionPoint
summary: The CrossSectionPoint class defines a point with possible chamfering information

constructors.name: CrossSectionPoint
constructors.summary: Creates a new cross section point instance.

methods.name: CompareTo
methods.summary: Compares two points. To use binarysearch somekind of sorting should be used.

methods.name: Equals
methods.summary: Returns true if the current object and the given object are equal.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Returns a hash code for the point. Notice, in extremely rare cases, you might not get the same hash code for two points even though they are considered equal! This should, however, happen only in extremely rare cases!

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Formats the point into a string.

methods.name: Translate
methods.summary: Translates the point using the given vector.

methods.name: Zero
methods.summary: Zeros all the members of the point.

properties.name: Chamfer
properties.summary: The chamfer for the cross section point.
